mapper.sql: id, truck_id, driver_id, task_id, type, level, location, create_time, is_handled
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into alert_log (truck_id, driver_id, task_id, type, level, location, create_time, is_handled) values (#{truckId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{driverId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{taskId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{location,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isHandled,jdbcType=BIT})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

truck_id,
driver_id,
task_id,

mapper.update:
update alert_log
truck_id = #{truckId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
driver_id = #{driverId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
level = #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
location = #{location,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
is_handled = #{isHandled,jdbcType=BIT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update alert_log set truck_id = #{truckId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, level = #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, location = #{location,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, is_handled = #{isHandled,jdbcType=BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select id, truck_id, task_id, type, level, location, create_time, is_handled from alert_log
